title: Device Home Screen - Device image updates after changing earcups
scenario: Device Home Screen headset image does not update to reflect swapped earcups on Falcon devices
steps: 1. Pair a device that supports swappable earcups (e.g., a Falcon device) with the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the device image displayed on the Home screen — it should show the currently attached earcups.
4. Remove the currently attached earcups from the device.
5. Observe the device image on the Home screen — it remains unchanged (does not update to reflect the removed earcups).
6. Attach a different set of earcups to the device.
7. Observe the device image on the Home screen — it should update immediately to reflect the newly attached earcups.
expected: The device image on the Home screen updates immediately to reflect the currently attached earcups when they are swapped.
